> >Description:

> 	Every Time xv loads you get two notice-windows that complain
> 	about missing japanese fonts.
> >Fix:
> 	none, remove of Japanese exetensions make port broken in config.sh

I already fixed this problem.
I divided xv port into graphics/xv japanese/xv, and graphics/xv-m17n.

Please use graphics/xv port in the current ports tree.

Thank you.
